category.scope_note: Wireless devices, IoT devices, radio transceivers, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi equipment, and telecom terminal equipment exported from China to Tonga.

title.en: China-to-Tonga Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入汤加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入東加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Tonga TAL (Tele-Communications Authority of Tonga, now under the Ministry of Meteorology, Energy, Information, Disaster Management, Environment, Climate Change and Communications) type approval obligations, electrical safety requirements (240 V / 50 Hz, Type I Australian plug), local importer requirements, English/Tongan labelling obligations, and cybersecurity obligations under the Computer Crimes Act 2003.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与汤加TAL（汤加电信管理局，现由气象、能源、信息、灾害管理、环境、气候变化及通信部主管）型号认证义务、电气安全要求（240V/50Hz，I型澳式插头）、本地进口商要求、英语/汤加语标签义务及《2003年计算机犯罪法》下网络安全义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與東加TAL（東加電信管理局，現由氣象、能源、信息、災害管理、環境、氣候變化及通信部主管）型號認證義務、電氣安全要求（240V/50Hz，I型澳式插頭）、本地進口商要求、英語/東加語標籤義務及《2003年電腦罪行法》下網絡安全義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TAL determination, customs decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Tonga law, TAL type approval requirements, and applicable regulations with qualified professionals before shipment or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TAL裁定、海关决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或供应前，应与合格专业人士核验现行汤加法律、TAL型号认证要求及适用法规。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TAL裁定、海關決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或供應前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行東加法律、TAL型號認證要求及適用法規。

answer_first.en: The main Tonga gaps for a China-made wireless or IoT device are: (1) TAL (Tele-Communications Authority of Tonga, under the Ministry of Meteorology, Energy, Information, Disaster Management, Environment, Climate Change and Communications) mandatory type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment — SRRC and MIIT NAL are not recognised; (2) electrical compliance for 240 V / 50 Hz and Type I (Australian AS/NZS 3112) plug — Chinese CCC electrical approval is not recognised, but AS/NZS test reports are accepted; (3) appointment of a local Tongan importer or agent, which is practically required in this very small market (~100K population); (4) English and/or Tongan-language labelling; and (5) basic cybersecurity obligations under the Computer Crimes Act 2003 where the device connects to Tongan networks. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognised in Tonga.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的无线或物联网设备进入汤加的主要差距包括：(1) 无线和电信终端设备须取得TAL（汤加电信管理局，现隶属气象、能源、信息、灾害管理、环境、气候变化及通信部）强制型号认证——SRRC及MIIT网络准入许可不被认可；(2) 须符合240V/50Hz及I型（澳式AS/NZS 3112）插头的电气规范——中国CCC电气安全认证不被认可，但AS/NZS测试报告可被接受；(3) 须指定汤加本地进口商或代理，该小市场（约10万人口）实际上必须如此；(4) 须提供英语和/或汤加语标签；(5) 设备接入汤加网络时，须遵守《2003年计算机犯罪法》的基本网络安全义务。CE、FCC及CCC标志在汤加均不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的無線或物聯網裝置進入東加的主要差距包括：(1) 無線和電信終端設備須取得TAL（東加電信管理局，現隸屬氣象、能源、信息、災害管理、環境、氣候變化及通信部）強制型號認證——SRRC及MIIT網絡准入許可不被認可；(2) 須符合240V/50Hz及I型（澳式AS/NZS 3112）插頭的電氣規範——中國CCC電氣安全認證不被認可，但AS/NZS測試報告可被接受；(3) 須指定東加本地進口商或代理，該小市場（約10萬人口）實際上必須如此；(4) 須提供英語和/或東加語標籤；(5) 裝置接入東加網絡時，須遵守《2003年電腦罪行法》的基本網絡安全義務。CE、FCC及CCC標誌在東加均不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
